use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in web forms and interfaces
Triggering actions and state changes in interactive UIs
Navigation and routing controls in single-page applications
Destructive action confirmation buttons with visual feedback
Composition with Radix UI Slot for polymorphic component behavior
ai_summary: A polymorphic button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes using CVA for style composition. Supports Radix UI Slot for composition, hover states, and morphing between button states. Built with Tailwind CSS and follows Shadcn/ui design patterns for consistent styling.
